---
title: "How do People Relate to the Police? A Qualitative Study on Motivational Postures Towards the Police in Chile"
description: "Estudio cualitativo sobre posturas motivacionales hacia la policía en Chile."
venue: "Journal of Politics in Latin America, 18(1)"
tipo: articulo
date: "2026-01-01"
author: "Sáez Fuentealba, L., Gerber Plüss, M., Orchard Rieiro, M., Figueiredo, A."
authors: [luciano-saez-fuentealba, monica-gerber, macarena-orchard, ana-figueiredo]
reference: "Sáez Fuentealba, L., Gerber Plüss, M., Orchard Rieiro, M., & Figueiredo, A. (2026). How do People Relate to the Police? A Qualitative Study on Motivational Postures Towards the Police in Chile. *Journal of Politics in Latin America*, 18(1), 61-85."
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# How do People Relate to the Police? A Qualitative Study on Motivational Postures Towards the Police in Chile

Estudio cualitativo sobre posturas motivacionales hacia la policía en Chile.

**Autores OLES:** [Luciano Sáez Fuentealba](../equipo/luciano-saez-fuentealba.html), [Monica M. Gerber](../equipo/monica-gerber.html), [Macarena Orchard](../equipo/macarena-orchard.html), [Ana Figueiredo](../equipo/ana-figueiredo.html)

**Fecha:** 2026.

## Referencia sugerida

Sáez Fuentealba, L., Gerber Plüss, M., Orchard Rieiro, M., & Figueiredo, A. (2026). How do People Relate to the Police? A Qualitative Study on Motivational Postures Towards the Police in Chile. *Journal of Politics in Latin America*, 18(1), 61-85.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
